violations.text: The floors beneath market shelves have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice cream chest freezer, and the bagged ice freezer have an accumulation of frost. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2023

The floors beneath market shelves have an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2023
